name: fetchAndAppend
description: Infinite scroll support. Fetches the next page from a paginated API endpoint using a cursor and appends the results to the existing array at the specified data model path.

url.description: The API endpoint URL to fetch the next page from.

path.description: A JSON pointer path into the data model to resolve the cursor value dynamically.

cursor.description: The pagination cursor. Can be a literal string or a DynamicString referencing a data model path.

targetPath.description: The JSON pointer path in the data model where the fetched results will be appended to an existing array.

method.description: The HTTP method to use for the request.
